reviews.review_description: This app, after all these years, still captures me with awe. Just incredible to watch these performances like you are actually front row audience. I am waiting for updates and more of these shows, probably recorded with even better cameras and higher resolutions.

I bought this app several years ago for my quest 1. Now it does not load the videos anymore, I uninstalled it and reinstalled it from scratch but no luck. It only shows the starting screen but clicking in the videos icons will not play them.
Loved this but it's stopped working and will not update

When I purchased this a few years ago, it was wonderful. For a long time now, it hasn't worked. An apology showed on the screen, but the suggested alternative didn't work either. Yesterday (24 Aug 25), I managed to watch the Kurios show, but all other elements showed just the intro screen and synopsis. There is a serious issue with this app, and a fix is LONG overdue.

reviews.review_title: Unable to access Cirque du Soliel
reviews.review_description: Unfortunately, we can see the app but we’re unable to access it. We’ve relaunched the app, but none of the button are working to access it. Very disappointing. Can anyone help me access it?

reviews.review_title: Really good and now it is not!
reviews.review_description: I can only watch 2 shows...the rest does not work.

Over all it is good made.
The five stories, each 10 to 15 minutes, have a are quite fascinating.
Price is fair,
After download, movies stayed stored on my quest. 
Quality could be a bit better, but I think that's a hardware issue of the quest 3.

Can recommend, and I would like to have more of this kind of shows.
I loved this show, was a great experience!  So much to see, a new area to focus on each time I view it. I am looking forward to more applications like this.

I purchased and while I can download and watch the performances, which look incredible, I cannot hear anything even with the Quest volume at maximum level.  Please fix as I would prefer to not request a refund and rather be able to enjoy this title.  Thank you!  I will update my rating once fixed.

developer_response.body:
Hello, 

Just reaching out to let you know that we have a fix for the problem with the sound and this should now be live on the store with build 2.0.3.2. 

Unfortunately, to acquire this update, you will need to uninstall the old version of Cirque du Soleil first before installing the new version. Updating directly the application does not work.

Best Regards,
Customer Support Specialist, Felix & Paul Studios

reviews.review_description: I will PAY any amount you want. Just please, please make Cirque du Soleil in HD 120fps. Your material is the whole reason I watch VR. If it's NOT real, I'm NOT interested

My only criticism would be that there’s just not enough of this astounding artistry and imagination. All of the 5 experiences are beautifully filmed and put you right there amongst the performers. Downloading everything will require several GBs of space on your Quest, so perhaps download one at a time, enjoy and then delete from the hard drive. 

And I fully sympathise with the comments about these gloriously-talented professionals being thrown on the scrap-heap because of the pandemic. I work in the arts myself and have been made redundant. May I suggest that a percentage of the money made from this app go directly to the Cirque artistes as a thank you for their dedication and skill?

My advice for a good experience : download NOT stream. 
We want more from Le cirque du Soleil. 
Bravo les gars !
It is great
Enjoyed the intimate feel.
Worth every penny!  Very entertaining and immersive.
Love this
Amazing wish I had more of them

When I was about 9 years old I bought a VHS tape of Quidam from, I sh*t you not, the dollar store. I can’t even tell you how many times I watched it. I loved seeing these clips from other shows but man would I love to see Quidam on here.

Incredible 
I ve always wanted to go see a CIRQUE DE SOLEIL show and never got to … I must say in a way I m glad I didn t  I get to see all the shows  just for $9.00 plus tax and thrilled … Just amazing
Love to watch this kind of content on vr
